mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_batch (id, product_id, batch_no, quantity, available, supplier, purchase_price, warehouse, inbound_time, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{productId}, #{batchNo}, #{quantity}, #{available}, #{supplier}, #{purchasePrice}, #{warehouse}, #{inboundTime}, #{expireTime}, 1, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory_batch WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND available > 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY inbound_time ASC
